steps.title: Calculate the total area to paint
steps.content: Since the walls must be painted twice, the total area to cover is $2w$ square feet.

steps.title: Apply the coverage rate to find gallons needed
steps.content:
One gallon covers 70 square feet. Therefore, the number of gallons needed is:
$$P = \frac{2w}{70}$$
Simplifying by dividing both numerator and denominator by 2:
$$P = \frac{w}{35}$$
This matches choice D — D is correct.
